\providecommand{\Pageref}[1]{\hfill p.\pageref{#1}}
 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}
